zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugues De Tingry於1024年出生在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯布洛-素-梅時，他的父親Huon III de Tingry seigneur de Tingry27歲，母親Alixe de Desvres16歲。他和Louise De Neufchatel至少有1個兒子和5個女兒。他去世於1085年在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯廷格利享年61歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugues De Tingry于1024年出生在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯布洛-素-梅时，他的父亲Huon III de Tingry seigneur de Tingry27岁，母亲Alixe de Desvres16岁。他和Louise De Neufchatel至少有1个儿子和5个女儿。他去世于1085年在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯廷格利享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Tingry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cornish: from the Breton personal name Tangi, Tanguy (see Tanguy ).

variants.name: Tanguy
meanings: Breton: from the personal name Tanguy, originally a warrior's nickname, composed of tan ‘fire’ and ki ‘dog’. This surname is also found in Britain. Compare Tanguay .

variants.name: Tangney
meanings: Irish (Kerry): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Teangana ‘descendant of Teangana’, a personal name of unexplained etymology.

variants.name: Tingue
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Delphin, Yvrose.
Americanized form of an unidentified surname, possibly Cornish   Tingey  .

nameMeanings.name: Hugues
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Hugues Capet ( ?938–96 ) was ruler of France ( 987–96 ) and founder of the Capetian dynasty. See Hugh .

en.lifeSummary: When Hugues De Tingry was born in 1024, in Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, his father, Huon III de Tingry seigneur de Tingry, was 27 and his mother, Alixe de Desvres, was 16. He had at least 1 son and 5 daughters with Louise De Neufchatel. He died in 1085, in Tingry, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugues De Tingry est né en 1024, à Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, son père, Huon III de Tingry seigneur de Tingry, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Alixe de Desvres, avait 16 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 5 filles avec Louise De Neufchatel. Il est décédé en 1085, à Tingry, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugues De Tingry 1024 in Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Huon III de Tingry seigneur de Tingry 27 und seine Mutter Alixe de Desvres 16. Er hatte mit Louise De Neufchatel mindestens 1 Sohn und 5 Töchter. Er starb 1085 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Tingry, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugues De Tingry è nato il nel 1024 nel Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, il suo padre, Huon III de Tingry seigneur de Tingry, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Alixe de Desvres, aveva 16 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 5 figlie con Louise De Neufchatel. Morì nel 1085, nel Tingry, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugues De Tingryが1024年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスボウログネ-スル-マーで生まれた時，父Huon III de Tingry seigneur de Tingryは27歳，母Alixe de Desvresは16歳であった。彼はLouise De Neufchatelとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と5人の娘をもうけた。彼は1085年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスティングリーで61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugues De Tingry(이)가 1024년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 부로그니-수-머에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Huon III de Tingry seigneur de Tingry(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Alixe de Desvres(은)는 16세였다. 그는 Louise De Neufchatel(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1085년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 틴그리에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugues De Tingry nasceu em 1024, em Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, seu pai, Huon III de Tingry seigneur de Tingry, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Alixe de Desvres, tinha 16 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 5 filhas com Louise De Neufchatel. Ele faleceu em 1085, em Tingry, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, com 61 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugues De Tingry родился в 1024 г. в местности боулогне-сур-мир, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция, его отцу по имени Huon III de Tingry seigneur de Tingry было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Alixe de Desvres, 16. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 5 дочерей от Louise De Neufchatel. Он умер в 1085 г. в местности тингри, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция в возрасте 61 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hugues De Tingry nació en 1024, en Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, su papá, Huon III de Tingry seigneur de Tingry, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Alixe de Desvres, tenía 16 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 5 hijas con Louise De Neufchatel. Murió en 1085, en Tingry, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, a la edad de 61 años.
